arts.ttl: More injuries: Three Bayern Munich talents are set for a long spell on the sidelines
arts.sum: There is also bitter news for the U19s: Midfielder Bogdan Olychenko suffered an inner knee ligament injury during training and will be out for a long time. He gets substituted in to play his first friendly, breaks his collarbone within a few minutes and subsequently misses multiple months of action.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel latest: Will 19-year-old stay at Bayern Munich or head to the Premier League?
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is allegedly not ruling out staying with Bayern Munich beyond the end of the January transfer window after turning down Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Will Mathys Tel stay or go after turning down Tottenham?
arts.sum: Following reports that Mathys Tel has turned down a move to Tottenham, it's now being suggested that he could stay at Bayern Munich after all. However, a transfer remains a possibility, with Manchester United apparently leading the race.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Mathys Tel still weighing options; Bayern Munich could nab Xavi Simons this summer; Tottenham Hotspur picking up pieces after Tel rejection; FC Barcelona making moves?; Juventus star shoots down Saudi future; and MORE!
arts.sum: Mathys Tel weighing options, likely to miss Holstein Kiel match (Fabrizio Romano) Xavi Simons might have made the permanent move from Paris Saint-Germain to RB Leipzig, but that transaction will not prevent the attacker from turning around and making the jump to Bayern Munich during the summer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany, Max Eberl tackle Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is not going to underestimate Holstein Kiel — especially after what the 17th-place side did to Borussia Dortmund two weeks ago. A look at the rosters and injuries for Holstein Kiel and Bayern Munich.
